name: Imagor (Local storage)
tagline: Imagor is a fast, Docker-ready image processing server written in Go. This app will store the images in local file system, using mounted volume. If you want t
description:
Imagor is a fast, Docker-ready image processing server written in Go. This app will store the images in local file system, using mounted volume. If you want t


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  imagor-local:
    image: shumc/imagor:0.8.11
    volumes:
      - imagor-local-data:/mnt/data
    environment:
      PORT: 80
      IMAGOR_UNSAFE: 1
      IMAGOR_SECRET: 26759b747a71e955b54c6ecc71779277
      FILE_LOADER_BASE_DIR: /mnt/data
      FILE_STORAGE_BASE_DIR: /mnt/data
      FILE_RESULT_STORAGE_BASE_DIR: /mnt/data/result
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42051:80
volumes:
  imagor-local-data: null
